SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement

Class JkVersionProvider

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement.JkVersionProvider
public final class JkVersionProvider extends Object
Association between getModuleIds and version.

      Creates an empty version provider.

      Creates a version provider from the specified versioned modules.

    • getVersionOf

      public JkVersion getVersionOf(JkModuleId moduleId)
      Returns the version to use with specified module.

      public String getVersionOf(String moduleId)
      Returns the version to use with specified module.

    • version

      public JkDependency version(JkDependency dependency)

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Returns true if this provider is empty.

    • and

      public JkVersionProvider and(JkVersionProvider other)
      Returns a JkVersionProvider that is a union of this provider and the specified one. The versions present in the specified one will override versions specified in this one.

    • and

      public JkVersionProvider and(JkVersionProvider other, boolean override)

    • and

      public JkVersionProvider and(JkModuleId jkModuleId, JkVersion version)
      Returns a JkVersionProvider that is the union of this provider and the specified one.

      public JkVersionProvider and(JkModuleId jkModuleId, String version)
      See Also:
      • and(JkModuleId, JkVersion)

    • andBom

      public JkVersionProvider andBom(String dependencyDescription)
      Parameters:
      dependencyDescription - Can be expressed as group:name::pom:version or group:name:version. In last case, it will be converted in the first expression

    • andBom

      public JkVersionProvider andBom(JkCoordinate coordinate)

    • and

      public JkVersionProvider and(String versionedModule)
      Parameters:
      versionedModule - module group, name and version expressed as 'group:name:version'
